As a data analyst with over six years in financial services, I specialize in risk analytics, fraud detection, and compliance systems, leveraging my expertise in machine learning and artificial intelligence. Currently pursuing a Master’s in Business Analytics at UC San Diego, I focus on integrating advanced data solutions with actionable insights to address complex industry challenges.
At CNOOC Finance, I built a fraud/AML detection system, automated compliance processes, and developed analytics infrastructure for a multibillion-dollar portfolio. My technical skills include Python, SQL, NLP, and Tableau, which I utilize to create predictive models and data pipelines. I am motivated by opportunities to enhance trust and safety within fintech and financial services.

title: Analysis of Cars
text:
Let’s investigate the relationship between fuel efficiency (mpg) and engine displacement (disp) from the mtcars dataset.


Here is a plot:

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml

mtcars = pd.read_csv("https://gist.githubusercontent.com/seankross/a412dfbd88b3db70b74b/raw/5f23f993cd87c283ce766e7ac6b329ee7cc2e1d1/mtcars.csv")

corr = mtcars["mpg"].corr(mtcars["disp"])
print(f"Correlation between mpg and disp: {corr:.2f}")

plt.figure()
plt.scatter(mtcars["mpg"], mtcars["disp"], color="dodgerblue", s=40)
plt.xlabel("mpg")
plt.ylabel("disp")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Correlation between mpg and disp: -0.85

title: Analysis of Cars
text:
Here is a plot:

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.datasets import fetch_openml

mtcars = pd.read_csv("https://gist.githubusercontent.com/seankross/a412dfbd88b3db70b74b/raw/5f23f993cd87c283ce766e7ac6b329ee7cc2e1d1/mtcars.csv")

corr = mtcars["mpg"].corr(mtcars["disp"])
print(f"Correlation between mpg and disp: {corr:.2f}")

plt.scatter(mtcars["mpg"], mtcars["disp"], color="dodgerblue", s=40)
plt.xlabel("mpg")
plt.ylabel("disp")
plt.tight_layout()

title: Ziyan (Freya) Zheng
text:
💼 Work Experience



Credit Risk Analyst


CNOOC Finance Co., Ltd. — Beijing, China


Aug 2020 – Jul 2024


Managed and monitored a commercial lending portfolio of ¥30B+ across 50+ corporate clients. Built credit risk scoring models, developed an AML transaction monitoring system from scratch after uncovering an embezzlement case, and led a 15-person cross-functional team to upgrade the lending monitoring platform. Authored ~100 regulatory and bureau-facing reports and drove portfolio risk reduction initiatives.




Settlement & Transaction Banking Analyst


CNOOC Finance Co., Ltd. — Beijing, China


Jul 2017 – Jul 2020


Executed daily settlement operations and managed transaction banking workflows. Conducted KYC due diligence, monitored fund flows for anomaly detection, and contributed to internal controls and compliance frameworks for financial operations.





🎓 Education



M.S. in Business Analytics


University of California, San Diego — Rady School of Management


Sep 2024 – Jun 2026 (Expected)


Coursework: Machine Learning, Fraud Analytics, Data Mining, Statistical Modeling, Project Management. Capstone project with Experian on fraud portfolio analytics. Built AI-powered applications including a pet diet recommendation app and wine rating prediction system.




M.S. in Financial Analysis


University of New South Wales - Sydney, Australia


July 2016 – Jun 2017 (Expected)


Coursework: Business Risk Management, Applied Portfolio Management and Modelling, International Financial Statement Analysis, Business Analysis and Valuation, Capital Budgeting and Financial Decisions.




B.A. in Commerce (Accounting & Quantitative Business Analysis)


University of Sydney - Sydney, Australia


July 2013 – Jun 2016


Coursework: Statistical Modelling for Business, Predictive Analytics, Management Science, Methods of Decision Analysis, Discrete Mathematics, Auditing and Assurance, Corporate Finance.





🛠 Skills & Tools


Python SQL Polars Pandas Scikit-learn Tableau Excel / VBA Credit Risk Modeling Fraud Detection AML / KYC Regulatory Reporting
